message:
fix(replay): strengthen trace event matching to compare logical_time and data

Make trace divergence detection more precise by comparing additional fields
beyond just kind and time.

- Add PartialEq + Eq derives to TraceData and TraceEvent
- Extend events_match() to also compare logical_time and data fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
